subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Rest thou assured in God's grace, and be in the utmost joy and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مطمئن بفضل الهی باش و در نهایت سرور و ثبوت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of example
